description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 5 unit/build/flake/data cluster: suite membership curation vs flake diagnosis, CI machinery, coverage auditing, and diff review (shipped code-reviewer).

cases.prompt: Decide which tests belong in smoke versus nightly, retire the dead ones with rationale, and clean up the skip list.
cases.reason: Membership, tiering, retirement, and quarantine enforcement are curation — filling the tiers the architecture defined.

cases.prompt: Design the CI tiers, sharding, and retry mechanics for our suites.
cases.reason: Tier machinery and budgets are automation architecture; the curator assigns tests within them.

cases.prompt: Which requirements and critical paths have no tests at all?
cases.reason: Mapping coverage/gaps is the audit; the curator consumes its output for promotion decisions.

cases.prompt: Review this PR that deletes 40 old tests — is it safe to merge?
cases.reason: Reviewing an actual diff is the shipped code-reviewer (a curation decision list may be its input, but the merge-gating review is not curation).
